zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Shoresworth於大約1270年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾時，她的父親Robert de Shoresworth37歲，母親Cecily de Denton30歲。她於1290年與Sir William Holland在英國藍卡爾武普 霍蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1363年在英國英格蘭享年94歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Shoresworth于大约1270年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾时，她的父亲Robert de Shoresworth37岁，母亲Cecily de Denton30岁。她于1290年与Sir William Holland在英国藍卡爾武普 霍蘭结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1363年在英国英格兰享年94岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾波利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Shoresworth was born about 1270, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Shoresworth, was 37 and her mother, Cecily de Denton, was 30. She married Sir William Holland in 1290, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1363, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 94, and was buried in Bury, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Shoresworth est née environ 1270, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Shoresworth, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Denton, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Holland en 1290, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1363, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterrée à Bury, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Shoresworth um 1270 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Shoresworth 37 und ihre Mutter Cecily de Denton 30. Sie hat 1290 in Up Holland, Lancashire, England Sir William Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1363 im Alter von 94 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bury, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Shoresworth è nata il circa 1270 nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Shoresworth, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Cecily de Denton, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Holland nel 1290, nel Up Holland, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1363, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolta a Bury, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Shoresworthが約1270年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Shoresworthは37歳，母Cecily de Dentonは30歳であった。1290年にイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドでSir William Hollandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1363年にイギリスイギリスで94歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Shoresworth(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Shoresworth(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily de Denton(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1290년 영국 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 Sir William Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1363년 영국 잉글랜드에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Shoresworth nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Shoresworth, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Denton, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Holland em 1290, em Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1363, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 94 anos, e foi sepultada em Bury, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Shoresworth родилась около 1270 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Shoresworth было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Denton, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Holland в 1290 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1363 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 94 лет и была похоронена в местности бури, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Shoresworth nació aproximadamente 1270, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Shoresworth, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Cecily de Denton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir William Holland en 1290, en Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1363, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 94 años, y fue sepultada en Bury, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
